zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Cathcart於大約1308年出生在英國蘇格蘭格拉斯哥卡夫卡特時，她的父親William Carleton32歲，母親Mrs William Carleton30歲。她和William de Eyckles 2nd Laird of Kildonan至少有1個兒子。她去世在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾莫利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cathcart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Cathcart was born about 1308, in Cathcart, Glasgow, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Carleton, was 32 and her mother, Mrs William Carleton, was 30. She had at least 1 son with William de Eyckles 2nd Laird of Kildonan. She died in Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William d’Eyckles 2nd Laird of Kildonan. Elle est décédée à Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Cathcart um 1308 in Cathcart, Glasgow, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Carleton 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs William Carleton 30. Sie hatte mit William de Eyckles 2nd Laird of Kildonan mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.Kildonan, Kilmory, North Ayrshire, Ayrsh: イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルモーイ
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Cathcartが約1308年にイギリススコットランドグラスゴウカスカートで生まれた時，父William Carletonは32歳，母Mrs William Carletonは30歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Eyckles 2nd Laird of Kildonanとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルモーイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Cathcart(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 스코틀랜드 글라스고 캐스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Carleton(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs William Carleton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 William de Eyckles 2nd Laird of Kildonan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬모리에서 사망했다.
